name: identifier-escaping-pattern
description: SqlBackend implements escapeIdentifier() for PostgreSQL: double-quotes with quote-doubling escape. DDL needs same pattern plus SQLite variant (backticks or double quotes). Pattern: escapeIdentifier(name, dialect).
recommendation: Extract escapeIdentifier into shared utility (src/utils/sql.ts or src/ddl/utils.ts) usable by both SqlBackend and DDL generator.
